content.problemStatement:
In order to beat AlphaZero, Chef Ada is improving her chess calculation skills.

Today, Ada took a big chessboard with NNN rows (numbered 111 through NNN) and NNN columns (numbered 111 through NNN). Let's denote the square in row rrr and column ccc of the chessboard by (r,c)(r, c)(r,c). Ada wants to place some rooks on the chessboard in such a way that the following conditions are satisfied:


Each square of the board contains at most one rook.
There are no four rooks forming a rectangle. Formally, there should not be any four valid integers r1r_1r1​, c1c_1c1​, r2r_2r2​, c2c_2c2​ (r1≠r2,c1≠c2r_1 \neq r_2,  c_1 \neq c_2r1​=r2​,c1​=c2​) such that there are rooks on squares (r1,c1)(r_1, c_1)(r1​,c1​), (r1,c2)(r_1, c_2)(r1​,c2​), (r2,c1)(r_2, c_1)(r2​,c1​) and (r2,c2)(r_2, c_2)(r2​,c2​).
The number of rooks is at least 8N8N8N.
Help Ada find a possible distribution of rooks. If there are multiple solutions, you may find any one. It is guaranteed that under the given constraints, a solution always exists.
constraints: the sum of N2N^2N2 over all test cases does not exceed 5⋅1065 \cdot 10^65⋅106
`ExplanationThe output depicts the top left 4×44 \times 44×4 square on the board. The rest of the board is cropped.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains a single integer NNN.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print NNN lines. For each valid iii, the iii-th of these lines should contain a single string with length NNN describing row iii of the chessboard; for each valid jjj, the jjj-th character of this string should be 'O' if there is a rook in the square (i,j)(i, j)(i,j) or '.' if this square is empty.

sampleTestCases.output:
OO.O [96 characters follow]
O... [96 characters follow]
..O. [96 characters follow]
O... [96 characters follow]
[96 lines follow]

hidden.expectedOutput:
OO.O [96 characters follow]
O... [96 characters follow]
..O. [96 characters follow]
O... [96 characters follow]
[96 lines follow]
